input.prompt:
I have a solution with 3 MSTest 3.8.0 test projects that currently run on VSTest.
I want to switch all of them to Microsoft.Testing.Platform. We're on .NET 8 SDK
and use `dotnet test --logger trx` in CI. What changes do I need to make to each
project and to the CI command? I want properties set consistently across all projects.

input.initialPrompt:
I have a solution with 3 MSTest 3.8.0 test projects that currently run on VSTest.
I want to switch all of them to Microsoft.Testing.Platform. We're on .NET 8 SDK
and use `dotnet test --logger trx` in CI. What changes do I need to make to each
project and to the CI command? I want properties set consistently across all projects.

data.content:
## Migrating MSTest 3.8.0 â†’ Microsoft.Testing.Platform

### 1. Add a `Directory.Build.props` (shared across all test projects)

```xml
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <UseTestingPlatform>true</UseTestingPlatform>
    <TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>true</TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport>
  </PropertyGroup>
</Project>
```

- **`UseTestingPlatform`** â€“ switches MSTest 3.8+ to run on MTP instead of VSTest.
- **`TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport`** â€“ keeps `dotnet test` working (it bridges the new platform back to the CLI verb).

Place this file in the common ancestor directory of your three test projects so it applies to all of them automatically.

### 2. Per-project changes

**None required** if you're already on MSTest 3.8.0 (`Microsoft.Testing.Platform` is bundled transitively). Just confirm each `.csproj` has:

```xml
<PackageReference Include="MSTest" Version="3.8.0" />
```

(If you were using the older split packages `MSTest.TestAdapter` + `MSTest.TestFramework`, consolidate to the single `MSTest` meta-package.)

### 3. CI command change

```diff
- dotnet test --logger trx
+ dotnet test --logger trx --tl:off
```

`--tl:off` disables the new terminal logger (which can swallow structured output in CI). The `trx` logger continues to work as before under MTP.

### Summary of what each property does

| Property | Purpose |
|----------|---------|
| `UseTestingPlatform` | Opts MSTest into MTP runtime |
| `TestingPlatformDotnetTestSupport` | Enables `dotnet test` compatibility layer (required on .NET 8; .NET 9+ has it by default) |

No other runner packages or adapters are needed â€” MSTest 3.8 brings everything in transitively once the property is set.

Let me provide a concise answer covering the necessary changes.
